title: cassia fisheri
intro: Cassia fisheri, also known as the Cassia tree or Senna, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical regions. Its medicinal properties have been utilized for centuries, particularly in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and laxative properties. The health benefits of Cassia fisheri include its ability to relieve constipation, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis. Cassia fisheri can be prepared as herbal tea, powder, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
